message.content:
@startuml
title usecase16 考试成绩复查

participant "GUI" as GUI
participant "Login" as Login
participant "ScoreReviewApply" as ScoreReviewApply

GUI -> GUI: 登录系统（账号，密码）
activate GUI
GUI -> Login: create(用户)
deactivate GUI

GUI -> GUI: 复查成绩（ScoreReviewApply）
activate GUI
GUI -> ScoreReviewApply: 成绩复查申请结果(复查结果)
deactivate GUI

GUI -> GUI: 离开系统（）
activate GUI
GUI -> Login: delete（用户）
deactivate GUI
Login <<>> Login

@enduml
